rulings.Case Title: SHUNN CALDWELL ET AL VS. 233-237 EDDY STREET, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion Of Plaintiff Pursuant To Ccp 337.31 To Substitute A Successor In Interest On Behalf Of Deceased Named Plaintiff Yvonne Lapenias
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday January 21, 2015, line 1. PLAINTIFF SHUNN CALDWELL, WAYNE JACKSON, SIRENA GIPSON Notice Of Motion Of Plaintiff Pursuant To CCP 337.31 To Substitute A Successor In Interest On Behalf Of Deceased Named Plaintiff Yvonne Lapenias GRANTED. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CARLY MCCARTY VS. NELLIE MUGANDA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Response To Interrogatories And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday January 21, 2015, line 2. PLAINTIFF CARLY MCCARTY Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Response To Interrogatories And Request For Sanctions transferred to department 301 to be heard on February 1, 2106 at 9:00 a.m. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of the moving papers to department 301 no later than January 22, 2016 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date at place. = (501/REQ)
Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday January 21, 2015, line 3. DEFENDANT BARBARA SAMUEL DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR, dismissal on file. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MATTHEW MA, TRUSTEE OF THE MA FAMILY TRUST, U.D.T. VS. GUI YAN ZHOU
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday January 21, 2015, line 4. DEFENDANT GUI ZHOU DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint is not uncertain. Specifically, service of Notice not uncertain per CCP 1166(a)(5). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MATTHEW MA, TRUSTEE OF THE MA FAMILY TRUST, U.D.T. VS. WEI FA WU ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday January 21, 2015, line 5. DEFENDANT WEI WU DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint is not uncertain, specifically verification is not uncertain per CCP 1166(a)(1). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MATTHEW MA, TRUSTEE OF THE MA FAMILY TRUST, U.D.T. VS. WEI FA WU ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-15-653970 WITH CASE CUD-15-653971
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday January 21, 2015, line 5. DEFENDANT WEI WU MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-15-653970 WITH CASE CUD-15-653971 DENIED without prejudice. Moving party failed to sustain burden under CCP 1048. = (501/REQ)
